description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global before_script to create a build directory, cd into it, set CXXFLAGS=-Werror and enable CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE. Define five jobs (arch, buster, stretch, static-analysis, thread-safety-analysis) each using the appropriate Docker image from registry.gitlab.com/eidheim/docker-images (arch, buster, stretch). In the arch, buster, and stretch jobs run the shared script: cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .. && make && make test, then rm -r *, then cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DUSE_STANDALONE_ASIO=ON .. && make && make test. In the static-analysis job run scan-build cmake .. && scan-build --status-bugs make. In the thread-safety-analysis job run CXX=clang++ cmake .. && make, all executing in the default stage.
